title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #15, Momonosuke, Yamato as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: and how they miraculously returned to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that, I think a well earned break is in order.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Now, where shall we place this flag?
